# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: sidecar-config
spec:
  egress:
    - port:
        number: 15000
      protocol: TCP
  proxyAdminPort: 15000

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: ingressgateway
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: LISTENER
    patch:
      "@type": TYPE_CONFIG_LISTENER_NETWORK_FILTER
      filterChain:
        filter:
          typedConfig:
            "@type": TYPE_URL_REMAP
            urlMap:
              apiVersion: type.googleapis.com/istio/config/v1beta1
              kind: ConfigType
              value: envoy/admin
  - applyTo: HTTP_FILTER
    patch:
      "@type": TYPE_CONFIG_HTTP_FILTER
      filterChain:
        filter:
          typedConfig:
            "@type": TYPE_HTTP_FILTER
            httpFilter:
              apiVersion: type.googleapis.com/istio/config/v1beta1
              kind: ConfigType
              value: envoy/admin
  - applyTo: CLUSTER_LISTENER
    patch:
      "@type": TYPE_CONFIG_CLUSTER_LISTENER
      filterChain:
        filter:
          typedConfig:
            "@type": TYPE_URL_REMAP
            urlMap:
              apiVersion: type.googleapis.com/istio/config/v1beta1
              kind: ConfigType
              value: envoy/admin

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-entrypoint
spec:
  exports:
    - port:
        number: 15000
      protocol: TCP
  locations:
  - workloadSelector:
      labels:
        istio: ingressgateway
  endpoints:
  - address:
      hostname: "envoy-admin.default.svc.cluster.local"
    ports:
      number: 15000
